prompt: specs/ 폴더의 테스트 플랜을 기반으로 Playwright 테스트 코드를 생성해줘
assertions: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize the browser before any interaction
Executes each test step live in the browser (click, type, navigate) before generating code
Calls generator_read_log to retrieve the recorded execution log
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts output files
Generated test code uses describe/test block structure with meaningful test names
Each action in the generated code has a step comment explaining what it does
Generated code includes // spec: and // seed: comments at the top referencing source files
